title: Aterrizaje del propulsor B77 en Bahamas
title_en: Falcon 9 B1077 Landing in the Bahamas
excerpt: SpaceX completa con éxito la 26ª misión del propulsor B1077 con un aterrizaje vertical en la barcaza 'Just Read the Instructions' en Exuma Sound.
excerpt_en: SpaceX successfully completes the 26th mission of booster B1077 with a vertical landing on the 'Just Read the Instructions' droneship in Exuma Sound.
